title.rendered: Atami Lot steps from the Palmarcito Beach

content.rendered:
Experience the perfect blend of coastal vibes and modern potential with this prime 597 m² lot in the heart of Atami.

As one of the first gated communities located in the department of La Libertad, Atami carries a prestigious reputation for privacy and exclusivity. Today, it remains one of the most sought-after spots on the coast, offering a secure, laid-back atmosphere that resonates with both long-time residents and a new generation of surf-and-sun seekers.

Show more

Property Highlights

  • Prime Location: Perfectly situated just steps from the sand, giving you effortless access to the Pacific.

  • Ready-to-Build: A flat, versatile canvas of 597 m² ideal for a modern architectural masterpiece or a high-yield vacation rental.

  • Natural Vibe: Enjoy constant ocean breezes and a landscape that feels lush and serene, without sacrificing security.

Unbeatable Lifestyle & Amenities

Living in Atami means you are at the doorstep of the best experiences La Libertad has to offer:

  • Elite Surf Breaks: You are minutes away from world-class waves at El Palmarcito, K59, and the legendary Sunzal.

  • Dining & Social Scene: Enjoy sunset dinners at Beto’s Restaurante (just a 5-minute drive) or grab a craft beer at Cadejo Brewing Co. nearby.

  • Atami Escape Resort: Residents can access the community’s iconic saltwater pools and private beach club facilities.

  • Proximity to the Action: You’re just a short drive from the vibrant nightlife and cafes of El Tunco and the «Bitcoin Beach» vibes of El Zonte.

A Smart Investment in El Salvador’s Future

There has never been a better time to invest in La Libertad. The Salvadoran government’s massive commitment to tourism and the Surf City initiative has transformed the region into a world-class destination. With significant infrastructure improvements and a booming travel sector, properties located in premier communities like Atami are seeing incredible value growth.

Whether you’re looking to design your own weekend escape or tap into the thriving short-term rental market, this lot places you right in the center of El Salvador’s coastal renaissance.

Quick Specs:

  • 📍 Location: Atami, La Libertad

  • 📐 Size: 597 m²

  • 🏝 Access: Direct beach access just steps away

content.rendered:
Escape to one of El Salvador’s best-kept secrets—a pristine, oceanfront lot at Playa Corral de Mulas, where tranquility meets unparalleled investment potential. This expansive property offers more than just land; it offers a gateway to a private, nature-infused lifestyle on the country’s scenic western coast

Show more

Nestled within a lush and secluded coastal stretch, this 11,760 m² (16,805 v²) parcel is a true hidden gem. With direct access to a serene, virgin beach, it’s the perfect canvas for building your dream home, eco-retreat, or private getaway—far from the crowds, yet within reach of key destinations.

Property Highlights:

  • Oceanfront Access: Direct frontage to the calm and untouched shores of Playa Corral de Mulas

  • Secluded & Serene: An ideal setting for privacy, relaxation, and nature immersion

  • Strong Investment Potential: Rare offering in an emerging coastal corridor

  • Convenient Access:

    • 2.5 hours from El Salvador International Airport (SAL)

    • 3 hours from San Salvador

    • 3 hours from the Port of La Libertad

Why Invest in Western El Salvador Now?

El Salvador is rapidly gaining recognition as a premier travel destination, thanks to significant investments in tourism infrastructure, security, and international promotion. Coastal regions—especially the less-developed western shores—are attracting attention for their natural beauty, surf culture, and eco-tourism potential.

With the government’s ongoing “Surf City” initiative and growing interest in sustainable and adventure travel, areas like Playa Corral de Mulas are poised for growth—making now an ideal time to secure a foothold in this promising market.

Offering Price: $299,000 USD (Negotiable)

This is a rare chance to own a substantial piece of oceanfront land in one of Central America’s most exciting emerging markets.

title.rendered: Cangrejera Lots just a few steps from the beach

content.rendered:
Twin Lots Steps from the Ocean in Playa Cangrejera

Discover two beautiful, flat lots located just steps from the ocean in Playa Cangrejera—one of El Salvador’s most recognized and sought-after beaches. Nestled in a charming neighborhood of private vacation homes and Airbnb rentals, these properties are a rare opportunity to build your dream retreat or investment project.

Show more

Why These Lots Stand Out:

  • Prime Location – Just 30 minutes from El Salvador International Airport, and minutes from Surf City hotspots in La Libertad.

  • Second Row, but So Close to the Beach – While technically in the second row, the lots are only a short walk down a small beach access path. With a second story or rooftop terrace, you’ll enjoy refreshing ocean views.

  • Natural Beauty – The lots are flat, shaded with mature trees, and offer a peaceful environment perfect for building.

  • Year-Round Sandy Beach – Cangrejera is known for its wide sandy shoreline, swimmable conditions, and consistent beauty throughout the year.

  • Proven Rental Potential – The area is home to a strong flow of Airbnb guests and vacationers seeking authentic coastal living.

Location & Travel Times:

  • To El Salvador Intl. Airport: approximately 30 minutes by car via modern coastal highways.

  • To Puerto de La Libertad: just 10–15 minutes by car, with quick access to dining, surfing, markets, and seaside attractions.

Whether you’re envisioning a private family beach house, a modern villa with rooftop views, or an income-generating Airbnb investment, these twin lots in Playa Cangrejera offer the perfect canvas. They can be purchased together or separately, depending on your vision.

Live the Lifestyle You’ve Always Imagined
Whether you’re a surfer, an investor, or someone who dreams of waking up to ocean breezes and mountain sunsets, this isn’t just land—it’s the foundation for your future lifestyle.

If you’re looking for a premium coastal investment with limited availability and strong appreciation potential, this is a property you don’t want to miss.

content.rendered:

Welcome to The Cliff—an exclusive residential haven designed for those who seek the perfect harmony between luxury and nature. Know more

Surf City isn’t just a destination—it’s the future of coastal living. With booming infrastructure, premium amenities, and skyrocketing property values, this is your chance to own a piece of paradise where every sunset feels like a masterpiece.

Why The Cliff?

  • Expansive Lots (800–1,200 sq. yards) – Generous spaces designed for privacy and panoramic ocean views.

  • Green Living – Conservation areas and lush landscapes for a lifestyle in tune with the environment.
  • Cutting-Edge Technology – High-speed fiber optics and 24/7 security monitored from your smartphone.
  • Legal Security & Condominium Regime – Fully permitted, with structured governance for shared harmony.
  • Gated & Secure – Controlled access ensuring peace of mind for you and your family.

Surf City: The Rise of a Premier Destination

More than just a surf paradise, Surf City is El Salvador’s fastest-growing coastal hub, featuring:

  • Modern infrastructure
  • Shopping centers, medical services, and banking
  • World-class gyms and wellness spaces
  • Accelerated real estate appreciation

Investing here means securing a lifestyle of exclusivity, profitability, and natural beauty—all while being part of a thriving community.

Your Oceanfront Legacy Awaits

Spaces at The Cliff are limited—don’t miss this opportunity to own in one of Central America’s most sought-after developments.

Live where the waves meet wonder.

Payment methods

Ownership Made Simple

title.rendered: Exclusive Residential Lot for Sale in Xanadu

content.rendered:
Seize the opportunity to own a prime piece of paradise in the prestigious Xanadu residential area, one of the most exclusive communities along El Salvador’s breathtaking coastline. This lot offers an unparalleled lifestyle, featuring access to a luxurious beach club exclusively for residents and a pristine private beach. The property features professionally constructed retaining walls, providing a solid foundation for your new project.

Show more

Prime Location for Surf Enthusiasts

Situated just minutes from the iconic El Sunzal beach, renowned for hosting the best surf competitions in El Salvador, and the vibrant El Zonte, famous for its world-class waves suitable for all levels, this location is a haven for surf enthusiasts. Whether you’re a seasoned surfer or just starting, you’ll find the perfect wave at minutes from this lot.

Growing Coastal Development

The coastal area of El Salvador is experiencing an exciting wave of development fueled by significant government support. New projects are transforming the region into a vibrant community with many amenities.

It’s located 16 minutes from the Surf City Highway Bypass and 20 minutes from Puerto de la Libertad. El Encuentro Surf City Mall has begun construction; it is a mall with a supermarket, pharmacies, and international restaurants. The Ministry of Public Works (MOP) has already started the expansion to four lanes on the Litoral highway with the first section of El Puerto de La Libertad; section 2 will include Tunco, and section 3 includes up to El Zonte, all included in phase 1 of expansion, with new businesses, infrastructure, and luxury residences. The recent opening of Texaco San Blas and Puma Energy gas stations in addition to The Point shopping plaza

This momentum enhances the quality of life and promises excellent investment potential.

Your Gateway to Luxury Living

Don’t miss out on this rare opportunity to own a piece of Xanadu, where luxury meets natural beauty. Embrace a lifestyle of relaxation, adventure, and exclusivity in one of El Salvador’s most sought-after coastal destinations. Act now and make your dream of owning a seaside retreat a reality!                                                       

Features

  • 10 minutes from La Libertad port

  • 10 minutes from El Zonte surf break.

  • Residencial Private club – Swimming pool – Beautiful sandy beach – Green areas, cobbled and concreted streets – Private security

Chiltiupan Oceanview Lot

This lot is a huge piece of property, and 5 minutes from El Zonte beach, everything to Surf City and to top it off, with a breathtaking ocean view! El Zonte Beach is one of the most incredible surf spots in the country and also a very cool town with a very cool vibe; restaurants, skate parks, amazing sunrises, sunsets spots, and of course, Amazing Waves!

This land is the perfect location for a hotel or to develop a residential project. make your appointment today to visit.

Features
  • 20 minutes from La Libertad port

  • 5 minutes from El Zonte surf break.

  • 15 minutes from El Tunco town

  • 10 minutes from Km 59 and Km 61 surf breaks
